title: Design a Ci/Cd Pipeline
shortDescription: Design a CI/CD pipeline system that can execute variable-length tasks organized in stages, where each deployment event triggers a sequence of tasks that must be processed through the pipeline stages.

Were You Asked This?
Design a Ci/Cd Pipeline

Design a CI/CD pipeline system that can execute variable-length tasks organized in stages, where each deployment event triggers a sequence of tasks that must be processed through the pipeline stages.

Asked at:

Question Timeline

See when this question was last asked and where, including any notes left by other candidates.

Company
Company
Level
​
Level
Region
All Regions
Region

Early May, 2026

OpenAI

Senior

I was asked to design GitHub Actions for 100M DAU. 
Needed to show how the task trigger will work, how logs are stored, and how to quickly access them. 
A big part of the discussion I devoted to details related to the basic security of running external code on my worker machines and how I'd isolate those envs (docker containers, prevent internet access, whitelisting, endless loop prevention, etc.).

Early April, 2026

OpenAI

Mid-level

Design a CI/CD pipeline focused on backend development, emphasizing orchestration and infrastructure while excluding client-side considerations.

Early April, 2026

OpenAI

Senior

Late September, 2025

OpenAI

Mid-level

Early May, 2025

OpenAI

Staff

Each event is a list of tasks that the pipeline needs to execute in stages. Tasks are variable length.
